name: Chocolate Sour Cherry Cake
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Sifted flour with 1 teaspoon salt
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Melt the chocolate and butter together in a heatproof bowl, then let cool slightly.
3. In a separate bowl, beat the egg yolks and sugar until pale yellow.
4. Add the melted chocolate mixture and egg whites to the yolk mixture, stirring gently to combine.
5. Pour the batter into a greased 10-1/2 inch spring form pan.
6. Scatter the drained sour cherries evenly over the top of the batter.
7. Bake for 55 minutes, or until set.
8. Allow to cool in the pan for 15 minutes, then run a knife around the edge to loosen the cake.
9. Let the cake cool completely before removing it from the pan.
Servings: 10
